page: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz without hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. Local storage is provided by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 4 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The virtualization layer is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates strong performance characteristics. Single-core CPU performance via stress-ng is positioned in the top tier (top 10%), while multi-core performance falls within the top 25%. Memory bandwidth tests, including both small-block cached reads and large-block uncached reads and writes, consistently rank in the top 25%, supported by a top-tier Passmark memory score. Computational workloads such as software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, and image processing also register in the top 25% tier. For database and key-value operations, the instance achieves strong results, processing 77.38 million Redis SET operations per second.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high single-core performance offer high compute density for parallel processing tasks without the resource contention of shared-core environments. However, the 2.0 GB of RAM per core represents a potential tradeoff for memory-intensive applications that require larger datasets to be held in memory. This hardware profile is highly suited for compute-heavy workloads, including software compilation, database operations, text processing, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor on the x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.3 GHz with a KVM hypervisor, the server includes 64.0 GB of memory (2.0 GB per core) and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. It delivers strong performance across multiple benchmarks, with single-core CPU performance and Passmark memory scores ranking in the top 10% tier. Multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and software compilation capabilities consistently place in the top 25%. With a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers high compute density. It is well-suited for parallel processing, software compilation, database operations, and text processing workloads.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core and strong multi-core performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and 400 GB NVMe SSD storage.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core compute optimized platform featuring high speed local NVMe storage and top tier single core processing performance.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-core AMD EPYC Milan processor with dedicated CPU allocation.
Equipped with 64 GB of system memory and a 400 GB NVMe SSD.
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and memory benchmark results.
Baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps with KVM virtualization.
Optimized for software compilation, database operations, and parallel computing.
